name: Shrimp with Garlic Cream Sauce Over Linguine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring 6 cups of water to a boil.
2. Using a small paring knife, remove the vein along the back of each shrimp and rinse under running water.
3. Add garlic to the boiling water and cook for two minutes.
4. Add the shrimp to the water and cook with the garlic for 2-3 minutes.
5. Drain the shrimp and garlic.
6. Peel the garlic and finely chop it.
7. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
8. Add the chopped garlic and cook for 1 minute.
9. Pour in the heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
10. Cook until the cream begins to thicken.
11. Stir in parsley, parmesan, and shrimp.
12. Season with salt and pepper.
13. Pour the sauce over linguine in a large bowl and toss to coat.
14. Garnish with parsley and parmesan.
